full_text: Mustafizur to Dipendra Singh, Caught by Litton Das!! It does not get much better. Nepal just made things really hard for themselves.

full_text: Mustafizur to Aasif Sheikh, Caught by Shakib!! Another wicket, and it's a big one. Aasif Sheikh was the batter who got most of those runs against South Africa. He was looking good today as well but his innings has been cut short. A tad overpitched and just outside off, Sheikh goes for a cover drive but can't keep it down. Shakib at short cover almost makes a mess of it, takes the catch on a second attempt. Almost burst through his hands, lobs up off his shoulder and allows him a second chance at the catch.

full_text: Tanzim Hasan Sakib to Rohit Paudel, Caught by Rishad Hossain!! Gone! Tanzim wins the battle here. A short of length delivery offering width. Rohit Paudel out cheaply, he got just a bit carried away perhaps in his joust with Tanzim.
